notes: Render-frame trace checks composed source fields; native render-operation tests additionally verify selected RenderFrame inputs reach the V1Display leaf draw calls. Physical LCD/pixel-camera verification remains separate manual/future coverage.

invariants.query: where primaryKind in [V1_LIVE,V1_PERSISTED,ALP_LIVE,ALP_PERSISTED] assert bandStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind in [V1_LIVE,V1_PERSISTED,ALP_LIVE,ALP_PERSISTED] assert arrowsStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind in [V1_LIVE,V1_PERSISTED] assert frequencyStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind != NONE assert bogeyStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind == V1_LIVE assert muteStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind in [V1_LIVE,ALP_LIVE,ALP_PERSISTED] assert signalBarsStatus == MATCH
where primaryKind in [ALP_LIVE,ALP_PERSISTED] assert owner == ALP and renderedBand == BAND_LASER
